title: rosa viscaria var. arvernensis
intro: Rosa viscaria var. arvernensis, also known as the Arvernian viscaria rose, is a subspecies of the viscaria rose (Rosa viscaria), a type of fragrant and evergreen rose native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Rosa viscaria var. arvernensis lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Rosa viscaria var. arvernensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
